parameters.content:
## SharePoint File Auto-Linker
Runs every hour. Fetches Pipedrive recents (activities, notes, files), finds SharePoint URLs in text fields, resolves each via Microsoft Graph API, then uploads files or adds folder notes to the correct Pipedrive entity.

**Env vars required:**
- `PIPEDRIVE_API_TOKEN`
- `PIPEDRIVE_DOMAIN`

**Credential required:**
- Microsoft Graph OAuth2 (Files.Read.All scope)

## Section 1: Trigger + Fetch
Scheduled hourly. Timestamp persisted in static data.
Fetches all recents since last run with safe pagination.

## Section 2: SharePoint Resolution
Encodes SP URL → Graph API → branch on file vs folder.
⚠️ Replace credential ID below with your real Microsoft Graph OAuth2 credential ID
